message:
test(auth): cross-cloud auth regression suite for SigV4 signing and presigning [24llg.3.5]

43 tests covering AWS SigV4 header signing, presigning, payload hashing,
credential redaction, cross-region/service/date determinism, encoding safety
(special chars, unicode, query params), HTTP method variants, session tokens,
header ordering, and presign URL structure verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
